meta_description: Data-driven MMA analysis built on the Nivarax algorithm.
hero_desc: Win probabilities generated by a deterministic model that evaluates each fight as a dynamic interaction between fighters and their styles.

tr_desc: Every Nivarax prediction published to date, with verifiable results.
about_what_p1: FightStats is a statistical analysis platform focused on MMA fights (currently covering UFC events only). We are not a tipster service. We don't sell guaranteed picks and we have zero affiliations with sportsbooks. Our goal is to publish data analysis transparently, built entirely on models developed by Nivarax, a data analytics startup.
about_what_p2: All analysis runs on NVX-MMA, a probability estimation algorithm developed from a computational physics framework by Daniel Cortes, a Physics student. Its core principle is to model the fight as a competitive event, rather than rating fighters in isolation.
about_what_p3: The result is a matchup-centered approach: how two fighting styles interact inside the cage, and what probabilities emerge from that confrontation.
about_how_p1: Instead of scoring each fighter separately and comparing individual ratings, NVX-MMA models the fight as a competitive system between two opponents. It computes every feature as a relative differential between both fighters, so the advantage emerges from the matchup itself — not from prior rankings or isolated assessments.
about_how_p2: The model also explicitly separates two concepts that other systems tend to conflate: uncertainty (how much we actually know about a fighter) and degradation (whether there's evidence of real performance decline). Both factors affect the estimated probabilities in distinct ways and are part of every published analysis.
about_access_p1: FightStats is currently in its validation phase. During this stage, every analysis produced by NVX-MMA is published freely and openly while we build a verifiable prediction track record.
about_access_p2: No subscriptions, no ads. The platform presents each analysis transparently, alongside the full historical results log so anyone can evaluate the model's performance for themselves.
disclaimer_1: ⚠️ FightStats provides statistical analysis for educational and informational purposes only. Published content does not constitute financial advice or betting recommendations.
disclaimer_2: The probabilities and analyses presented are estimates based on statistical models. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
disclaimer_3: FightStats has no affiliations with sportsbooks and receives no compensation tied to gambling activity. Gambling can be addictive. If you choose to bet, do so responsibly. (KNOW YOUR LIMITS).
footer_disclaimer_1: FightStats is an independent statistical analysis project applied to MMA. Published content is informational only and does not constitute financial advice or betting recommendations.
footer_disclaimer_2: Powered by NVX—MMA, an agent interaction modeling algorithm developed from computational physics by Daniel Cortes, Physics student.
footer_verse: "He has shown you, O mortal, what is good. And what does the Lord require of you? To act justly and to love mercy and to walk humbly with your God." — Micah 6:8
